subject.title: Anglais
subject.description: Programme intégral d'anglais pour la classe de Terminale

data.title: Module 1: Family and social life
data.description: Use language to provide personal information.

data.title: Unit 1: Applying for a passport
data.summary: Real life situation: Applying for a passport

contentSections.title: Listening & Speaking
contentSections.body: Listen to a complex text for specific personal information and answer yes/no questions. Ask for, obtain and give personal information in a role play.

contentSections.title: Reading
contentSections.body: Read a form asking for personal information. Revise the skill of prediction. Answer questions about the text.

data.title: Unit 2: Discussing recreational activities
data.summary: Real life situation: Discussing hobbies and recreational activities

contentSections.title: Objectives
contentSections.body: Listen to a personal testimony on the benefits of preferred hobbies. Talk about hobbies and recreational activities and their benefits. Read stories about recreational activities. Skim a text for the main ideas.

data.title: Unit 3: A job interview
data.summary: Real life situation: Applying for a job

contentSections.title: Objectives
contentSections.body: Listen to instructions on providing information and documents to furnish at a job interview and fill in missing words. Predict, skim and scan newspaper articles announcing job vacancies.

data.title: Unit 4: Anticipating one's second language needs at work
data.summary: Anticipating one's second language needs at work

contentSections.title: Objectives
contentSections.body: Listen to a radio report for specific information about one's second language needs at work and write short answers. Answer questions about the report.

data.title: Unit 5: Dealing with the second language at work
data.summary: Using the second language at work

contentSections.title: Objectives
contentSections.body: Listen to personal testimonies in a radio interview. Role play persuading and negotiating working conditions. Discuss tasks related to future jobs.

data.title: Module 2: Economic life and occupations
data.description: Using language to talk about consumer economy, community resources and time management.

data.title: Unit 1: Consumers and communities
data.summary: Assessing consumer and community resources and services

contentSections.title: Objectives
contentSections.body: Listen to a conversation involving routine expressions and terms that describe a consumer economy and community services.

data.title: Unit 2: Read before you buy
data.summary: Compare prices or quality to determine the best buys

contentSections.title: Objectives
contentSections.body: Listen to a presentation that compares details about the prices or quality of products. Write short answers to questions.

contentSections.title: Objectives
contentSections.body: Listen to a talk on the appropriate use of banking services. Express your opinions about the safety of banking services.

data.title: Unit 4: Improving community services
data.summary: Taking part in community activities and helping to improve them

contentSections.title: Objectives
contentSections.body: Listen to a poem about serving others. Answer questions about the text.

data.title: Unit 5: Manage your time well
data.summary: Helping with the acquisition of community time management skills

contentSections.title: Objectives
contentSections.body: Listen to a radio programme about personal time management. Ask questions and exchange information about time management.
